overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban commercial district during golden hour. The scene features holographic billboards, neon signage, moderate vehicle traffic, and pedestrians in a dense cyberpunk city environment with modern architecture and construction barriers lining the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial sidewalk with construction barriers

events.description: transitioning from orange sidewalk onto asphalt crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street
turning left at the intersection after crossing the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the orange-textured sidewalk following a pedestrian in white clothing, then crossing the street and turning left at the intersection

notable_agents.action: person in white outfit walking ahead along the sidewalk
futuristic black sedan driving along the street

entered.detail: distinctive orange paved pedestrian walkway with geometric texture
white and orange striped metal barriers lining the sidewalk edge
large futuristic digital billboards displaying advertisements on building facades
tall modern glass and steel towers with neon signage

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a third-person view following a pedestrian along an orange-textured sidewalk in a futuristic city. Construction barriers line the right side while holographic billboards and high-rise buildings dominate the skyline. The character crosses a multi-lane street with moderate traffic and turns left at the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with pharmacy and crosswalk

events.description: stopping at the crosswalk corner to wait for traffic to clear
observing vehicles including a military truck passing through the intersection

agents.ego_description: standing stationary at the crosswalk corner observing traffic and the pharmacy building across the street

notable_agents.action: large military-style truck driving through the intersection
small blue compact car parked near the pharmacy entrance

entered.detail: green storefront with illuminated signage reading SHIPLEY'S PHARMACY
wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow and black stripes
tall pole with traffic signals and attached signage

segments.scene_description: The camera stops at a wide urban intersection, facing a green pharmacy building across the street. The scene is open with full sky visibility, showing a yellow-striped crosswalk and moderate traffic including a military truck. The camera remains stationary, observing the surroundings and waiting to cross.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with pharmacy and advertising displays

events.description: beginning to walk across the wide crosswalk toward the pharmacy
reaching the opposite sidewalk and continuing past the pharmacy entrance

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide yellow-striped intersection toward the pharmacy, then walking along the sidewalk passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket walking ahead in the same direction
person in dark clothing walking toward the camera

entered.detail: wall-mounted digital advertising displays with exposed red wiring and conduits
covered walkway under the building facade providing partial shade

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wide intersection with yellow stripes and reaches the sidewalk in front of Shipley's Pharmacy. The camera continues walking along the orange-textured path, passing under building overhangs with exposed wiring and digital advertisements. Pedestrians walk in both directions along this busier section of the commercial street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic commercial district, transitioning from a construction-lined sidewalk to a wide urban intersection and finally into a dense shopping area. It begins by following a pedestrian along an orange-textured path past construction barriers and towering holographic billboards before the character crosses a multi-lane street. As the character reaches the intersection, the camera pauses to observe a wide, open vista featuring a green pharmacy building and a military truck passing through yellow-striped crosswalks. The scene then shifts back into motion as the character crosses the street and continues along the sidewalk in front of Shipley's Pharmacy. Finally, the camera moves under building overhangs with exposed wiring and digital advertisements, weaving through a busier crowd of pedestrians.
